series_metadata.series_description: Working papers used to review and determine corrective action plans to assure Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO) operations are compliant to laws and regulations as well as operating efficiently. Records include, but are not limited to, the final audit reports, audit programs, narratives, testing, work papers, supporting documentation and follow-up corrective action plan.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from issuing of Final Audit Report. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately. Any source documentation received from AGO sections, units, or special counsel should be retained no longer of value ; Electronic: from issuing of Final Audit Report. Any source documentation received from AGO sections, units, or special counsel should be retained no longer of value
